# Change Log

Short notes for recent app changes.

Use this file to record:

- what screen or flow changed
- what the user now sees or does
- whether the change affects local data, global sync, or both
- any behavior that future work should not break

Keep each entry short.

| Date | Area | Summary | Local or Global |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |
